descricaoRecuperarSenha: Enter your email address to receive a password reset link.
mensagemSeguranca: *For security reasons, the response is generic (it does not reveal whether the email exists).
mensagemSucessoRecuperacao: If an account with this email exists, we will send recovery instructions.
mensagemFalhaSolicitacao: Failed to send request. Please try again.
descricaoNovaSenha: Create a strong password for your account.
erroFalhaRedefinirSenha: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
sucessoSenhaRedefinida: Password reset successfully! Please log in with your new password.
